title: Live Updates: After G7 Leaders Praise U.S.-Iran Deal, Trump Threatens Iran Again
summary_full: President Trump said the United States would resume bombing Iran if he did not like the preliminary agreement, hours after leaders from the Group of 7 nations called the deal a “breakthrough.”
summary_public: President Trump said the United States would resume bombing Iran if he did not like the preliminary agreement, hours after leaders from the Group of 7 nations called the deal a “breakthrough.”
